_comment: Residual-extraction config. Override any field via env var (uppercase, e.g. LAYERS=10,30,50).
_layers_help: Layer-spec syntax: 'middle' | 'early' | 'late' | int | 'i,j,k' | 'start:stop:step' | 'all'. Indexes into hidden_states (0 = embeddings, 1..n_layers = transformer block outputs).
_dtype_help: Storage dtype on disk: 'fp16' (~2 bytes/value) or 'bf16'. fp16 is the default — small range loss, but ~half the disk of fp32.
